title: Special Demand Type Definitions
description: Defines the taxonomy of special demand point types (airports, schools, attractions, etc.) for use by the Subway Builder mod UI. Each type has a unique code, display metadata, optional sub-types, and an icon hint for rendering. Designed to be extensible across maps and mappers.

version.description: Schema version. Increment on breaking changes.

types.description: All top-level special demand type definitions.

LocalizedString.description: A dictionary of locale-keyed display strings. '__default__' is the unlocalized fallback; additional keys are BCP 47 locale tags (e.g. 'ja', 'en', 'es').

id.description: Machine-readable identifier. Lowercase snake_case, suitable for variable names and foreign keys. Must be unique across all types.

code.description: Short uppercase alphabetic code (2-4 chars, optionally compound with underscore) used as a point ID prefix in demand_data. Must be unique across all types.

label.description: Human-readable category name for UI display.

description.description: Short description of what this category contains.

icon.description: Lucide icon name (https://lucide.dev) for UI rendering.

sub_types.description: Optional narrower classifications within this type. Sub-types inherit the parent code but allow differentiated display.

metadata.description: Freeform key-value pairs for auditing, future mod plugins, or mapper-specific extensions.

DemandSubType.description: A sub-classification within a parent demand type.

id.description: Machine-readable identifier. Must be unique within the parent type's sub_types array and referenced by content points.

icon.description: Optional Lucide icon override. If omitted, inherits the parent type icon.
